Class BaseHandler

java.lang.Object
com.fisiocare.handler.BaseHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
HttpHandler
Direct Known Subclasses:
AgendamentoHandler, AuthHandler, DashboardHandler, FuncionarioHandler, PacienteHandler, SessaoHandler
public abstract class BaseHandler extends Object implements HttpHandler
Handler base — fornece utilitários de parsing, resposta e autenticação
